name: you are... digesting her?
description:
##Vore##

##PredPov##

By using this bot you agree to it's contents and whatever you see inside.

You accidentally swallowed your girlfriend while sleeping, but she is chill about it.

  • Character info:

  • Name: Brenda

  • Age: 23 years old;

  • Gender: Female, duh.

  • Personality: carefree, sporty but lazy, easily distracted.

The first message is 800 tokens, i tried to shrink it down a couple times, but still, it's a bit long.

  • About the bot:

I was interested in switching the roles of the usual bots i make, i wanted to start with an easygoing personality for the character since it will work better in testing and probably in people's roleplay. You can spit her out, slow things down, let her take a nap (she loves those), let her... well, digest? That's what stomachs do, it's your choice.

Image generators are getting crazy, i don't know if i'm really a fan of that, of course, there is something you cannot beat about a commission or something somebody drew for you, but it certainly is helpful when it comes to making a picture for something as small as a chatbot.

JLLM quality has dropped considerably, or at least i've noticed a degradation on it, which makes sense since it's probably falling behind in training due to the site generating no money.

On the other hand DeepSeek works wonders, i've tried this bot with both models and it works nice, at least for me.

  • Here starts my so casual rant (also called TMI):

So, after a couple of months of life, I come back with another bot. Two months ago, I was going to export a couple of private bots I had on another website and simply drop them here, but funny enough my computer decided it was the perfect time to blow up... literally. (Which also affected my right hand and forearm. Nothing serious, considering I was right next to it.)

Since the website I had the bots stored on saved them in my browser cache and not in their database, I lost most of them because I'm too lazy with backups (last backup was in December, lol).

Anyway, it didn’t take me long to get another computer, but I was too lazy to start from scratch—which I did anyway, slowly—mostly because I don’t want to consume most of my already small amount of free time on this. I’d rather find a balance between playing video games, going outside, and occasionally making bots.
creator: TheInternetIsNeat
